chapters.text: Israelte henga Pakai thusei Malachi thaneina hung kiphongdoh chu.
Pakaiyin “Nangho ka-ngailu’uve,” atin; nanghon la, “Nangin iti nei ngailut monguvam?” natiuve. Pakaiyin aseiyin, “Esau chu Jacob sopi hilouva nabol’uvam? Ahivangin keiman Jacob seh seh ka-ngailun,
Esau vang chu hotle mah-in kabol e; athinglhang gamsung katuchai hel’in, agoulo gamsung chu kamkeite lhatna thei bep leh nelgamin kakoipeh tai,” ati.

Ijemtin Edom miten, “Keiho vang eithecheh soh hel’u jongleh asekom jouse kisah phat kit nauvinge,” tin seiyu jongleh; thaneipen Pakaiyin aseiyin, “Akisah phat theiyu ahinai, ahin keiman kaphet lhah peh ding ahi; min gamgilou tah a aseidoh kahseuva kaphet phet jeng ding, ‘Achunguva tonsot geiya dia Pakai lunghanna mite ahitauve,’ tia akiseidoh kahseuva kabol ding ahi,” ati.
Hiche hi nanghon namit teni mong monguva namu’uva, “Aloupia chu Pakai bou ahin, Israel gamgi kalpeh a min jong ahei;” tia nasei cheh diu ahi.

“Chapan apa ajabol teiyin, soh-in jong apu ajabol teiye. Keijong mipa kahileh hoiba ham eikijabolna? Mipu kahi jongleh hoiba ham eikiginna chu? tin thaneipen Pakaiyin nahenguva aseiye, Vo thempuho, keima min nahsahmoa neiho. Hichea jong hin, ‘Iti keihon namin nahsahmoa kanei diu ham?’ nati nalaiyui.
Kamaicham phunga anneh abohsa natoh uvin; ahinla hichea jong hin, ‘Iti kasuh boh diu ham?’ nati kit nalaiyuve. Hitia nabolu hi Pakai dokhang chu nahsahmon kinei nante natiu ahiye.

Kilhaina gantha dia gancha mitchoho nato jiu chu thilse hilou ham? Gancha elbaiham, adammo ham nato tengu jongleh thilse hilouva nabolu ham? Hitobang thil ho hi nagam vaipo gape tem’uvin; gamvaipopa nachunga lung lhaiya, alung lhaije chu namusah mong diu hinam? tin thaneipen Pakaiyin aseiye.

Hijongleh tun Pathen lung lhaina dingin gaovun, chutileh aman eilungset thei diu ahi. Hitobang thilpeh nakhut’uva napeh uva kona hi koi hijongleu chun nachunguva lung lhai mong ding hinam? tin thaneipen Pakaiyin aseiye.

O kadeh, phatchomna beihela kamaicham phunga mei nati louna diuva nalah uva kotpi jouse gakhah a kamchah ding mi khat beh a umah hileh! Nachunguva kalung alhaipoi, tin thaneipen Pakaiyin aseiyin, chule nakhut’uva konin thilto sang ponge, ati.

Ajeh chu nisa soa pat nisa lhum geiya namtin vaipi lah a kamin kithang thang jenga, keima mina amuntina hi gimnamtui kitoh a kilhut nam nam jeng, thil theng tah tah kitoh toh jeng ahi; ajeh chu kamin hi namtin vaipi lah a loupi jingjeng ahi, tin thaneipen Pakaiyin aseiye.
Pakai dokhang kisuboh nante, natiuva chule achunga kilui anneh jong nahsahmon um nante, nati laitah-u chun nasuboh tauve.

Nanghon, ‘Hiche hi lunggim aum behseh bouve,’ natiuvin, hi tobang hin nangong neivaiput khumuve, tin thaneipen Pakaiyin aseiye. Pumhat a nalah-u ham, a-elbai ham, adamlou ham gancha chu nanghon thilto din nahin choi jiuve! Hitobang hi ken nakhut’uva kona kakisan dia nabol mongu ham? tin Pakaiyin aseiye.

Koi koi hijongleh akelngoi hon lah a achal neiya todoh dia kitepna neita a, ahivanga Pakai henga nolna umjoh toh a chu gaosap chang jeng hen; ajeh chu kei hi leng loupi tah kahin, namtin vaipi lah geiya min kamin hi gin le ja anei cheh ahi.
“Vo thempuho, tua hiche thupeh hi nangho ding ahi.

Ngaisah a nanei dauva, keima min loupi tah a bolna dia nalungthim’uva nachin dauva ahileh, keiman nachunguva gaosapna kalhalut’a, phatthei nachanna jouseu jong kagaosap ding ahi, tin thaneipen Pakaiyin aseiyin; nalungthima nachin loujeh-uva gao jong kagaosapsa ahitai, ati.
Vetan, keiman nason nachilhah jouseu kabeh lhah a, namaiyuva eh kathe khum ding, nason nachilhah miteu eh geiya kathe khum’uva ka-angsunga kona kadeldoh ding nahiuve.
Chutengleh hiche thupeh hi nahenguva kahinsol ahin, hijeh a hi Levi toh kakitepna pang det ding ahi, ti nanghon nahet diu ahi, tin thaneipen Pakaiyin aseiye.
Levi toh kitepna kanei chu hinkhoa ding leh chamna ding ahin, abonchan ama kapen, aman eigin theina dingin kapetai; aman jong eiging jingin, kamin ging khenchan apang jingnai.
Adih lama hilchahna chu akamsunga akimom jingin, akamsunga adihlou apot khapoi. Lung mongle lungdih pun kalhonpi jing jengin, mi tamtah jong themmona konin alehei theiyin ahi.
Ajeh chu them pupa kamsunga kona hetna hung potdoh jing ding, mihemm ama kamsunga kon a hilchahna akihol diu ahi; ajeh chu ama hi thaneipen Pakai sottol thangkouva pang ahi.
Ahivangin nangho hi lampia konin nakiheidoh uvin, mi nahil chatvai jeh uvin mi tamtah nakipal lhuhsah tauve; Levi toh kitepna geiyin nasuseuvin ahi, tin thaneipen Pakaiyin aseitai;

hijeh a chu keiman mitin vaipi masanga nahsahmoa kaumsah uva, kasuhnem nahiuvin, nanghon kalampi jouse juilouva nakoiyuva, mi nahilchah tengu jongleh langkaina neiya thil nabol jeh uva hitobanga hi kabolu nahi,” ati.
Eihon ibonchauva pa khatbou ineiyu hilou ham? Pathen khatseh chun eisem cheh-u hilou ham? Chuti ahileh khat’in khat chunga kitahna neilouva ium’uva, ipu ipateu kitepna isuhboh diu ham ong?

Judah chu kitahna beiyin anaumin, hijeh chun Israelte lah leh Jerusalem khopia thet umtah thil anaboldoh tai; ajeh chu Judah hin muntheng kiti lai Pakaiyin adeilai tah chu suhbohna din gamdang mi doihou pathen lim kisemthu chanu khat akichenpi.
Hitobang thil bola chu hihen lang ahettohsah a pangpa hihen, adonbut a pang hihen, thaneipen Pakai henga thilto dinga hinchoipa hijongleh Pakaiyin Jacob ponbuh dunga konin sumang hel hen!

Hiche jong hi nabol kit tauve: Pakai maicham chu nalhiu nalon khumsah sah jenguvin ahi, naka khum’un, napen khum khum jengui; ijeh-inem itileh Pakaiyin nathiltou chu ija gellouva sanjong nasanpeh louvu ahitan, lung lhaina jong neilouva nakhut’uva kona akisan lou ahitai.

Hichea jong hin nanghon, “Ipi dinga akisanda ham?” natiuve. Ajeh pen vang chu Pakai hi nang le nasenji najinu, kitepna neiyajia naneiya nakiloipi, achunga kitahna beiya naumji, hiche najinu chutoh nakah lhona ahetoh a aphotoh a pangjing ahijeh ahiye.

Pathen khatseh chun eisem’uva, hinna lhagao chu eikoipeh-u hilou ham? Chuti ahileh Pathenin adei khohpen chu ipi ham? Pathen pehlom tah thilto chu ahi. Hijeh hin nangho le nangho kichih theiyun, koimacha cha jong asenji-ajinu chunga kitahna beiyin umda jenghen.

Ijeh-inem itileh Pakai Israel Pathenin aseiyin, “Keiman jida kiti hi kahon, kadeipoi; pumhat’a mi ponnoi kimai jong kadeipoi, tin thaneipen Pakaiyin aseiye. Hijeh hin nangho le nangho kichih theiyun lang kitahna beiyin umdauvin,” ati.

Nakam tam behseh jenguvin Pakai nalung gimsah tauve. Ahivangin nanghon, “Keihon itia Pakai kalung gimsah beh diu ham?” nati nalaiyui. Pakai mitmua thilse bol jouse aphai, natiuva chule hitobang thil kibol ho chunga Pakai akipah jie,” tia nasei jeh uva nalung gimsah-u ahi. Chujongleh, “Thu adih dih a tanjia Pathen chu hoilama umba hitam?” tia nasei jeh-uva jong lung gima nalhau ahi.

“Vetan, keiman kasottol chu lampi semtoh din kamasanga kasol’e, nanghon nahol jingu Pakai chu photlot louva ahouina hung jeng ding ahi; achunga nakipa nau kitepna thangkouva pangpa chu, vetan, ahunge, tin thaneipen Pakaiyin aseiye.
Ahinah vangin ama hungna nikho chu kon adoujou ding hiya, ama ahung kilah teng apangjou ding koiham? “Ajeh chu ama hi sana khengpa meikong bangin akongin, ponsop ho sabon bangin aume;

ama chu sana lhajolpa bang leh dangka lhajolpa banga hung kitung ding, chutengleh Levi chapate asuh thenga, sana le dangka lhah a alhahjol sel ding Pakai henga thilto dih akitoh chet atodoh kahseuva asuh theng ding ahi.
Chuteng vangleh ni masa lai le kum masa laiya banga Judah gam le Jerusalem thilto chu Pakai dinga jong lung lhai lhai um jeng ding ahi.

“Chutah leh kenjong thutan dinga nahengu kahin nai ding, phunsan themho leh numeito chonse ho, jou le nal jenga kihahsel ho, soh thalah ho tohman chunga husa tah a bolgim ho, meithaiho le pabei nubei chagate bolgenthei ho, khopem ho peldoh a donlouva koiho, chule keima eiging louho douna hetman louhel’a hettohsah a kapan ding ahi, tin thaneipen Pakaiyin aseiye.
“Ahipoi, Pakai kitipa kei hi kikhel louhel kahi; hijeh chun vo Jacob chapate, nangho hi min nabahgam loulaiyu ahibouve.

Napu napateu khanglaiya pat’in keima chondan jouse chu najamsan’uvin, khatcha jong nanit bib hel’ui. Kahenga hung kile kit’uvin, keijong nahenguva hung kile kit inge, tin thaneipen Pakaiyin aseiye. Hichea jong hin nanghon ‘Iti ikile kit diu hiyah ong?’ natiuve.
Mihemin Pathen achom ngai hinam? Nanghon keima neichomu pi hi! Ahinla nanghon, ‘Iti nangma kachom diu ham?’ natiuve. Nahopsom to lou jeh-u le thilto ding natolou jeh-uva neichomu ahiye.
Hitia keima neichom jeh-uva najat pumpiuva nakigaosap soh hel’u ahitan, nachunguva gaosapna chua ahitai.

Hopsom lhingset’in hintoh uvin lang thil kholna insunga lhut soh keiyun, chutengleh keima houin sunga neh le chah thalhing ding ahi; chutengleh keijeng jong neipatep’uvin, tin thaneipen Pakaiyin aseiyin, nangho dia vangam bangkot jouse kahondoh a nangho dinga phattheina chu twi suna kasun lhah ding, aletlha hel a sung lha louva kaum louhel ding ahi.
Nangho bahgama pangpa chu keiman kabeh lhah ding ahin, hijeh a chu natohgau asuhmang kit lou ding ahitai; louma janga lengpigui jong gada lou ding ahi, tin thaneipen Pakaiyin aseiye.
Chutah leh namtin vaipin nangho hi phatthei boh achangtauve, nati diu ahi; ajeh chu nagam u jong kipa thanopna gam hiding ahi, tin thaneipen Pakaiyin aseiye.
“Kei douna thu nasei jouseu ahat thei lheh-e, tin Pakaiyin aseiye. Ahivangin la nanghon, ‘Iti nang douna thu kasei diu hiya ong?’ nati nalaiyun.
’Pathen kinbol a pan jong hi pannabei ahibouve,’ tin naseitauve. Eihon athupeh init’uva lunghem tah a thaneipen Pakai angsunga ivaleuva hi ipi phachom ham?
Tuapat’a vang mi kiletsah hoi tho ho phatthei boh achang jo’uvin, thilse bol’a pang ho jong aphatthei mai maiyu ahitapon, Pathen apatep geiyuvin jong ajamdoh thei tei teiyui,’ tin naseiyuve,” ati.

Chutah chun Pakai ging khencha um ho chu khat le khat akihou lim’uvin ahileh. Pakaiyin aseiyu angaiyin chule Pakai ging khencha uma a min gel jing ho suhmil louna din Pakai angsung laitah a hetjingna lekhabu khat’a akijih lut tai.

“Amaho hi keiya ding ahitauve, tin thaneipen Pakaiyin aseiyin, keiman na katoh nikhoa kei dia neitum mong mong hi diu ahin, hijeh a chu min ajenlea pang achapa akhenle le banga kenjong amaho hi kakhendoh a kahoidoh ding ahiuve.
Chutengleh nang hon adih le agilou nasekhen theiyuva, Pathen kinbola panglea kinbol a pang lou nasekhen thei diu ahi.

“Ajeh chu vetan, nikho chu meilhum sung kong leng lung bangin ahunge, hichea hi mi kiletsah jouse leh thilse bol jouse kipal lhusoh hel diu ahi; hiche nikho hung lhung hin hitobang miho hi mei banga akahvam diu ahi, tin thaneipeu Pakaiyin aseiye; hiteng hileh anikho hin apansatna ajung bulpi geiya chule abah geiya jong akhen louhel ding ahi.

Nangho keima min ging khencha um ho din vang them channa nisa hung soh-in tin, alhaving te nia jong mi damsah theina ahinpoh ding, nangho jong nathau noma bongkul sunga bongnoute banga nakichop’uva nakinunkho diu ahi.
Chule migiloute chu nachot phauva, keiman na katoh nikho chuleh abonchauva nakengto khotaljum noiyuva leivui banga kijam diu ahi, tin thaneipen Pakaiyin aseiye.
“Kalhachapa Mose danthu, chondan thule chonna dan jouse chu geldoh jing uvin, hiche ho chu Horeb lhanga keiman Israel pumpi dinga Mose kapeh ahi.
“Vetan, Pakai nikho loupi tah le tijat umtah hung lhun masanga Elijah themgaopa chu kahinsol peh ding nahiuve.

Elijah hin mipate lungthim jouse achateu lungthim banga aheidoh peh a achateu lungthim jouse jong apateu lungthim banga aheidoh peh ding ahi; achutilouva ahileh kahunga gamsung hi gaosapna khat’a kahung gaosap ding ahi,” ati.
